critic.verdict: An exceptionally well-polished, highly rhythmic, and musical chart that perfectly fits the synthwave style.

issues.problem: The defined outro section is completely empty, which can make the chart end anticlimactically instead of having a sustained fade-out note.
Introducing a 2-beat hold on GAP (Left) with an independent tap on BAR (Center) at 3.15s is a slightly steep coordination requirement for early Standard difficulty.

design_notes: For Section S0 and S1, we introduce the track with a sparse, high-impact pattern that respects standard difficulty pacing, eliminating the dense 7-note zig-zag from the previous build. In Section S2, we completely revamped the beat 26-35 loop sequence into an expressive, non-repetitive flow mapping pitch contour and beat emphasis across all lanes. Section S3 received similar care: we restructured the beats 45-56 sequence to break out of its rigid loop, offering sweeping transitions that adapt to the changing chords. Finally, the beat 61-64 trill has been replaced with a smooth wave pattern that elegantly incorporates the center BAR lane, ensuring a natural, rewarding performance standard.

design_sections.name: S0
design_sections.intent: A light introduction to establish the synth beat and baseline pacing.

design_sections.name: S1
design_sections.intent: A streamlined transition into the main energy section.

design_sections.name: S2
design_sections.intent: The primary drop section, utilizing varied sweeping lanes to highlight melody lines.

design_sections.name: S3
design_sections.intent: A highly active secondary phrase where the lane patterns breathe and shift logically.

design_sections.name: S4
design_sections.intent: A clean final outro note to resolve the rhythm path.
